calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Petitioner: Matthew Ahner Wood, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from Female to Male, and a new birth certificate reflecting the change of gender shall be issued.
Decree signed in open court.
